name: Stremio tvOS (Unofficial AltStore Source)
subtitle: Freedom to stream — unofficial AltStore-compatible source for Apple TV.
description: An unofficial AltStore source for Stremio on Apple TV (tvOS), compatible with any signing app that consumes the standard AltStore source format (Feather, AltStore Classic, ESign, Scarlet, Sideloadly, and others). NOTE: Stremio uses the same bundle identifier (com.stremio.pal) on both iOS and tvOS; most signing apps do not allow two apps with the same bundle ID in one source, so tvOS is published as a separate JSON file. For iOS / iPadOS add the separate source: stremio-ios.json. Stremio's official source uses Apple's encrypted App Store Connect marketplace manifest format and cannot be parsed by most signing apps; this source points to plain tvOS IPA artifacts publicly available on the dl.strem.io CDN.

apps.name: Stremio
apps.subtitle: Freedom to stream — Apple TV.
apps.localizedDescription: Stremio for Apple TV (tvOS), full-featured PAL build. Requires tvOS 15.0+. When installing pick the Stremio (PAL) entry inside this source; the iOS source uses the same bundle ID and may conflict — remove the iOS source if needed.

apps.name: Stremio Lite
apps.subtitle: Stream movies, series and more — Apple TV.
apps.localizedDescription: Stremio Lite — legacy release for Apple TV (tvOS). Requires tvOS 26.0+ (newer Stremio builds require newer tvOS on Apple TV). Prefer the newer Stremio PAL 2.x releases when available.
